content:
# Swishy kinetic typography templates - Overview

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: hero headline, launch page, marketing section, AI product intro, video overlay
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

Visual traits:
- kinetic typography
- typewriter
- sentence reveal
- wavy text
- logo typing
- RGB shift
- text morph

Use when:
- hero headline
- launch page
- marketing section
- AI product intro
- video overlay

Avoid when:
- long documentation
- form labels
- error messages
- dense admin table

AI summary: Use kinetic typography reveals for landing-page hero moments: typewriter, word/line stagger, wavy text, logo typing, or RGB-shift title, with a readable final state and reduced-motion fallback.

# Swishy kinetic typography templates - Layout Rules

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: hero headline, launch page, marketing section, AI product intro, video overlay
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Use kinetic typography on one focal headline, not every text block.
- Pair motion with strong hierarchy: headline first, supporting copy second, CTA last.
- Keep final resting state clean and readable after the reveal completes.

AI summary: Use kinetic typography reveals for landing-page hero moments: typewriter, word/line stagger, wavy text, logo typing, or RGB-shift title, with a readable final state and reduced-motion fallback.

# Swishy kinetic typography templates - Component Patterns

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: hero headline, launch page, marketing section, AI product intro, video overlay
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- typewriter headline
- sentence reveal
- wavy text
- logo typing

- animated counter

AI summary: Use kinetic typography reveals for landing-page hero moments: typewriter, word/line stagger, wavy text, logo typing, or RGB-shift title, with a readable final state and reduced-motion fallback.

# Swishy kinetic typography templates - Interaction States

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: hero headline, launch page, marketing section, AI product intro, video overlay
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- initial hidden
- typing
- line reveal
- settled
- hover accent
- loop optional

AI summary: Use kinetic typography reveals for landing-page hero moments: typewriter, word/line stagger, wavy text, logo typing, or RGB-shift title, with a readable final state and reduced-motion fallback.

# Swishy kinetic typography templates - Accessibility Notes

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: hero headline, launch page, marketing section, AI product intro, video overlay
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Provide final static text in the DOM.
- Avoid long typing delays before users can understand the page.
- Disable continuous wave/shake effects under reduced motion.

AI summary: Use kinetic typography reveals for landing-page hero moments: typewriter, word/line stagger, wavy text, logo typing, or RGB-shift title, with a readable final state and reduced-motion fallback.

# Swishy kinetic typography templates - Implementation Hints

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: hero headline, launch page, marketing section, AI product intro, video overlay
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Good default: opacity+translateY reveal with 40-90ms stagger per word or line.
- Typewriter should be short and meaningful; avoid simulating entire paragraphs.
- Use blur-in sparingly for premium feel, then settle to sharp text.

AI summary: Use kinetic typography reveals for landing-page hero moments: typewriter, word/line stagger, wavy text, logo typing, or RGB-shift title, with a readable final state and reduced-motion fallback.
